title: Blue Origin's New Glenn Explodes at Cape Canaveral — What the $2.8 Trillion Elephant in the Room Means for AMZN's Satellite Ambitions
subtitle: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded at 9 p.m. EDT Thursday during a static fire test at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station, destroying the vehicle
